## Summary

- Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] Ran `node scripts/validate-repo.mjs`
- [ ] Ran `bash -n install-codex.sh install-claude.sh install-both.sh`
- [ ] Updated examples or forward-test notes if skill behavior changed

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or local config were added
- [ ] Install paths and backup behavior were preserved
- [ ] Skill frontmatter remains valid
